prompt: An ethereal anime illustration of a young anime witch sleeping peacefully on a soft pillow, tucked under a voluminous, starry blanket that seamlessly blends into a bed of clouds. She has round glasses and flowing pastel rainbow hair. She is wearing a large, floppy witch hat and matching pajamas, both featuring a vibrant colorful galaxy camouflage pattern. The background is a deeply magical cosmic night sky filled with sparkling stars, illuminated by a bright star at the top center and framed by intricate glowing magical filigree forming a crescent moon. The scene is highly detailed and luminous, characterized by a soft, dreamy atmosphere and an deep blues and luminous purples color palette.
